headline: Kraft Heinz Vs. Mondelez: Same Roots, Diverging Trajectories
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company offers a more attractive risk/reward at current low multiples and a well-covered 7% dividend. Read more on KHC and MDLZ stock here.

headline: Ore-Ida Introduces "Ore-Ida or Nothing", New Creative Platform Celebrating its Legacy as the Inventor of Tater Tots
summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO, April 14, 2026--Today, Ore-Ida, the inventor of Tater Tots, announces "Ore-Ida or Nothing," a new creative platform reinforcing the brand’s legacy of innovation and unbeatable quality. Brought to life through a new campaign starring Keegan-Michael Key, the platform celebrates a simple truth that Ore-Ida has been proving for over 70 years: when it comes to potatoes, nothing beats the original.

headline: 1 Stock Under $50 to Target This Week and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The $10-50 price range often includes mid-sized businesses with proven track records and plenty of growth runway ahead. They also usually carry less risk than penny stocks, though they’re not immune to volatility as many lack the scale advantages of their larger peers.
